name: Ambassador
description: Bring negotiations to an instant conclusion with this Corpus assault rifle. Switch effortlessly between charged explosive shots and rapid-fire electrical assault mode.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Bring negotiations to an instant conclusion with this Corpus assault rifle. Switch effortlessly between charged explosive shots and rapid-fire electrical assault mode.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Update 30.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed magazine of the Ambassador flickering after reloading when equipped with the Ambassador Tenet Skin.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where the Ambassador’s magazine would get stuck to player’s hands if you interrupted the reload.
Fixed Ambassador Parts not being chat-linkable.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
Ambassador Component Blueprints have a chance to drop from Aurax Atloc Raknoids. The main Blueprint can now be attained as a Rotation C reward from any Corpus Railjack Survival mission.
After engaging with Community Feedback, we noticed that obtaining the Ambassador parts was a tough combination of playing the same mission in 4 different locations with some difficult RNG. The Ambassador components have also been moved to an enemy that was without a drop table!
Every Aurax Atloc Raknoid has a 15% to drop any component Blueprints for the Ambassador 
Enemies typically only drop Weapon Blueprints or component Blueprints which is why the Ambassador components were given individual Blueprints

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ambassador not triggering its Alt Fire radial attack when it hits an enemy.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.3
patchlogs.changes: Ambassador clip size increased to 96 and increased ammo pool to 960.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Ambassador weapon eligibility from Conclave.
